$description: The design system's token definitions, in DTCG format — the source of truth the app consumes through the sibling tokens.ts binding (and that a real pipeline would generate from via Style Dictionary). Note the evaluation never reads this file: it compares app *facts* to *policies*, and a policy needs no token catalog to know a value was hardcoded. These tokens exist because the app references them and humans read the guidelines against them — not as an allowed-set the checker massages in.
